bird.name: Louisiade pitta
bird.summary: The Louisiade pitta (Erythropitta meeki) is a species of the pitta. It was considered a subspecies of the red-bellied pitta.

relations.subject: Louisiade pitta
relations.evidence: It may be threatened by habitat loss, but is currently listed by the IUCN as Data Deficient as there have been no definite records since the type specimen was collected in 1898
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
